items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A standard soldier's blade. Reliable and sharp.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: A sturdy shield made of reinforced oak.

items.name: Leather Vest
items.description: A simple vest of boiled leather.

items.name: Traveler's Cloak
items.description: A dusty cloak that offers protection from the elements.

items.name: Minor Healing Potion
items.description: A small vial of red liquid.

items.name: Glass Dagger
items.description: A razor-sharp dagger made of tempered glass.

items.name: Shimmering Robe
items.description: A robe that seems to shift colors in the light.

items.name: Sun Elixir
items.description: A glowing golden potion that warms you from the inside.

items.name: Abyssal Blade
items.description: A sword forged from black iron that seems to absorb light.

items.name: Shadow Cloak
items.description: A cloak woven from shadows. It makes you harder to see.

items.name: Void Essence
items.description: A swirling vial of darkness. It tastes like cold ash.

items.name: Ironwood Staff
items.description: A staff carved from incredibly hard wood.

items.name: Barkskin Armor
items.description: Armor crafted from enchanted tree bark.

items.name: Wild Berry
items.description: A sweet berry that bursts with energy.

items.name: Wood
items.description: A piece of rough timber.

items.name: Cloth
items.description: A scrap of fabric.

items.name: Corpse
items.description: An empty corpse.

items.name: Thorn Whip
items.description: A flexible whip covered in razor-sharp thorns.

items.name: Oaken Staff
items.description: A smooth staff carved from ancient oak. It hums with natural energy.

items.name: River Stone Hammer
items.description: A heavy hammer with a head made of smooth, dense river stone.

items.name: Barkskin Vest
items.description: A vest made of treated bark. Very tough, but flammable.

items.name: Lilypad Cloak
items.description: A cloak woven from giant lilypads. It feels slick to the touch.

items.name: Elderberry
items.description: A dark purple berry known for its healing properties.

items.name: Sap Flask
items.description: A flask of golden tree sap. It smells sweet.

items.name: Heartwood Key
items.description: A key carved from the core of a corrupted tree.

items.name: Cactus Fruit
items.description: A prickly fruit that is surprisingly juicy.

items.name: Ice Shard
items.description: A piece of ice that never melts.

items.name: Rusty Coin
items.description: An ancient coin, corroded by time.

items.name: Swamp Root
items.description: A bitter root used in folk medicine.
